# Customizing Colors for Planner Display

Source: https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000418663

Helium offers several color customization options for how items appear on your Planner. These settings are found in [**Settings → Preferences**](https://app.heliumedu.com/settings).

## Available Color Options

  1. **Color for Events** — The default color applied to non-academic calendar items (Events)
  2. **Color for grades** — The color used when displaying grade badges on assignments
  3. **Color for resources** — The color used when displaying resource badges on assignments
  4. **Color by assignment category** — When enabled, Planner items are colored by their _assignment's category_ rather than by class. This is especially useful for visually distinguishing Homework vs. Quizzes vs. Exams, or for tracking workload across categories.

## Related Articles

  * [Planner Views, and Changing Your Default](https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000418667)
  * [How to Sync Google, Apple, or Other Calendars in to Helium](https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000418651)

---

## Helium Classic

In Helium Classic, these same options are available under [**Account → Settings → Preferences**](https://www.heliumedu.com/settings/#tab-preferences), but use slightly different labels.

__Helium Classic will remain available until July 31, 2026.__
